INSERT INTO events VALUES (now()), (now() - INTERVAL '1' HOUR), (now() - INTERVAL '2' HOUR);
SELECT hopEnd(event_time, INTERVAL '1' HOUR, INTERVAL '2' HOUR) FROM events;
CREATE TABLE users (user_id UInt32, signup_time DateTime);
INSERT INTO users VALUES (1, now() - INTERVAL '3' DAY), (2, now() - INTERVAL '4' DAY);
SELECT u.user_id, hopEnd(u.signup_time, INTERVAL '1' DAY, INTERVAL '1' WEEK) FROM users u;
SELECT hopEnd(now(), INTERVAL '30' MINUTE, INTERVAL '1' HOUR), hopEnd(now() - INTERVAL '10' MINUTE, INTERVAL '5' MINUTES, INTERVAL '2' HOUR);
CREATE TABLE transactions (transaction_time DateTime, amount Float64);
INSERT INTO transactions VALUES (now() - INTERVAL '15' MINUTE, 100.5), (now() - INTERVAL '30' MINUTE, 200.0);
SELECT hopEnd(t.transaction_time, INTERVAL '15' MINUTE, INTERVAL '1' HOUR) OVER (PARTITION BY t.amount) FROM transactions t;
WITH (SELECT hopEnd(now(), INTERVAL '2' HOUR, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) AS upper_bound SELECT upper_bound;
SELECT hopEnd(t.transaction_time, INTERVAL '1' MONTH, INTERVAL '1' MONTH) FROM transactions t WHERE t.amount > 150;
